abilities.name: Beyond's Reward
abilities.text: After an ally with a Flicker token kills an enemy model within 8" of this model, this model may kill the ally to infuse a (soulstone).

abilities.name: Protected (Oni)
abilities.text: After an enemy model targets this model, this model may discard a card. If it does so, a friendly Oni model within 2" suffers any effects generated by that action.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (t). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Demonic Tresses
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.

triggers.name: Gateway to the Beyond
triggers.text: Ally only. Make a Rift marker within 1" of the target.

triggers.name: Cocooned in Hair
triggers.text: Deal 2 damage to the target and give it a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: From the Maw
actions.effects: Summon an Oni minion that this model has not summoned this turn within range. The summoned model gains a Flicker token.

triggers.name: Riftborne
triggers.text: Remove a Rift marker within 2" of this model. Declare this action again; it receives a (+).

actions.name: Open the Gate
actions.effects: Make a Rift marker anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Repellent Passage
triggers.text: Enemies within (aura)4" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.
